description: Dumps the argument's value to the [[arma.RPT|report file]]. Each call creates a new line in the file.
examples:
<sqf>
_array = [1, "foo", player, "bar"];
{
	diag_log _x;
} forEach _array ; // creates 4 entries on 4 lines
</sqf>

<sqf>
_array = [1, "foo", player, "bar"];
diag_log _array; // Creates one entry of e.g. [1,"foo",B Alpha 1-1:1 (Player Name),"bar"]
</sqf>
name: diag_log
